Submit New Asset

Upload your file — AI will read it and fill in the details automatically. Review, adjust, and submit for quality review.

Upload Your Asset

PDF, Excel, PowerPoint or Word files will be read by AI to auto-fill the form below. ZIP files require manual description.

AI suggests a price after analysis — you can change it to any amount.

₹
Applicable Sectors *

Tick every sector this asset is relevant to. Buyers will filter the marketplace by these tags.

Marketplace Listing

These three sections appear on your asset's detail page in the marketplace exactly as you write them.

2–4 sentences. What does this resource do and why does it matter for Indian businesses?

List each deliverable on a new line — PDF, template, checklist, access duration, etc.

List the main sections or chapters buyers will see before purchasing.
